title: Argemia Plush
description: A Resource Pack that replaces the Small Amethyst Bud with the Red Argemia Plush from Voices Of The Void by MrDrNose (EternityDev)
body:
This Resource Pack replaces the Small Amethyst Bud with the Red Argemia Plush from [Voices Of The Void](https://mrdrnose.itch.io/votv), a game made by MrDrNose (EternityDev).

I mainly made this for me and a group of friends to mess around with on a realm, but might as well publish it for others to have fun with.
